author: edgl_dev
content:
Hi, you probably need to add these `el_extra_params: ["--syncmode=full", "--http.api=eth,net,web3,debug,admin,txpool"]` to the ethrex config in the .yaml
Soon <@281967554572976128> will share you his config.

author: edgl_dev
content: Also pushed a new image https://github.com/ethpandaops/eth-client-docker-image-builder/actions/runs/26030779938

author: ivanlitteri
content:
Thanks Edgar! This is the config I used:
```yaml
participants:
- cl_type: prysm
  cl_image: ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:glamsterdam-devnet-4-tmp-minimal
  vc_type: prysm
  vc_image: ethpandaops/prysm-validator:glamsterdam-devnet-4-tmp-minimal
  el_type: ethrex
  el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-4
  el_extra_params:
  - --http.api=eth,net,web3,admin   # workaround for kurtosis enode probe, see https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1392
  count: 2
  validator_count: 128
  supernode: true

network_params:
  preset: minimal
  seconds_per_slot: 6
  genesis_delay: 30
  fulu_fork_epoch: 0
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  genesis_gaslimit: 150000000
  gas_limit: 150000000

ethereum_genesis_generator_params:
  image: ethpandaops/ethereum-genesis-generator:6.0.6
```

author: terencechain
content: thanks, adding the extra params worked! looking into the issue now 🙂

author: terencechain
content:
this is my config, i built the images locally but let me try to docker images to confirm:
```
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: ethrex
      el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-4
      el_extra_params:
         - --http.api=eth,net,web3,admin   # workaround for kurtosis enode probe, see https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1392
  cl:
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: gcr.io/offchainlabs/prysm/beacon-chain:latest
      vc_type: prysm
      vc_image: gcr.io/offchainlabs/prysm/validator:latest
  count: 2

network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  preset: minimal
  withdrawal_type: "0x01"
  validator_balance: 40000
  genesis_gaslimit: 150000000
  gas_limit: 150000000

additional_services:
  - dora
  - assertoor
  - spamoor
  - checkpointz
spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master

assertoor_params:
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - { file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/master/playbooks/gloas-dev/builder-lifecycle.yaml" }

snooper_enabled: false
global_log_level: debug

port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true

checkpointz_params:
  image: ethpandaops/checkpointz:gloas-latest
```

author: 0xunclebill
content:
running this kurtosis yaml, was able to recreate the issue multiple times. need to let kurtosis run for like 15min

the lighthouse docker image is my local one
ethpandaops/lighthouse:glamsterdam-devnet-4 image is building rn, should be ready in 30min
```
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: ethrex
      el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-4
      el_extra_params:
         - --http.api=eth,net,web3,admin   # workaround for kurtosis enode probe, see https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1392
  cl:
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:glamsterdam-devnet-4-tmp
      vc_type: prysm
      vc_image: ethpandaops/prysm-validator:glamsterdam-devnet-4-tmp
    - cl_type: lighthouse
      cl_image: eserilev/lighthouse:glamsterdam-devnet-4
  count: 1

network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  withdrawal_type: "0x01"
  seconds_per_slot: 6
  validator_balance: 40000
  genesis_gaslimit: 150000000
  gas_limit: 150000000

additional_services:
  - dora
  - assertoor
  - spamoor
  - checkpointz
spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master

assertoor_params:
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - { file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/master/playbooks/gloas-dev/builder-lifecycle.yaml" }

snooper_enabled: false
global_log_level: debug

port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true

checkpointz_params:
  image: ethpandaops/checkpointz:gloas-latest
```
